commit.message:
fix(pdf): defer revokeObjectURL so download starts before URL is freed

The previous code called URL.revokeObjectURL() synchronously right after
a.click(), revoking the blob URL before the browser could initiate the
download. Fixed by deferring revoke by 5s with setTimeout.

Also: use window.URL explicitly, add user-visible alert on PDF error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: parent TextureRect inside img_bg with PRESET_FULL_RECT

Previous approach added TextureRect as a sibling of img_bg inside card.
Godot 4 can recalculate Control sizes on layout passes before the node
enters the scene tree, sending the texture outside the card bounds.

Fix: add TextureRect as a child of img_bg and use
set_anchors_and_offsets_preset(PRESET_FULL_RECT) so it fills the
background rect exactly — no manual coordinate math, immune to layout
recalc. Also set clip_contents=true on both card and img_bg so nothing
can overflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(compat): align format with original AeroFTP implementation

BREAKING: v0.1.0/v0.2.0 vaults are incompatible (no known users).
This release ensures full backward compatibility with vaults created
by AeroFTP's inline implementation.

6 compatibility fixes:
- HKDF labels: use original AeroFTP domain separation strings
- AES-SIV: use Aes256SivAead + Nonce::default() (not raw Aes256Siv)
- Filename encoding: BASE64URL_NOPAD (not hex)
- Header MAC position: bytes 448..512 (not 128..192)
- Header MAC computation: HMAC over full 512 bytes with MAC zeroed
- VaultManifest: add optional description field

Dependencies:
- Add data-encoding 2 for BASE64URL_NOPAD encoding
- Remove internal hex module (dead code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add chat FAB menu and new session flow (#213)

## Summary

- Replaces the Raw Logs and Start Review icon buttons in the chat input
bar with a **FAB speed-dial menu** that floats over the chat panel
- Adds a **"New Session" action** to the FAB menu that opens a bottom
sheet for selecting an executor, then creates and switches to the new
session
- FAB menu items: New Session (Add icon), Start Review (RateReview
icon), Raw Logs (Terminal icon with active state tint)

## Changes

- **NewSessionDialogState** — new data class for bottom sheet state
(executor selection, loading)
- **WorkspaceChatViewModel** — 4 new methods: `onNewSessionClicked`,
`onNewSessionExecutorSelected`, `onConfirmNewSession`,
`onDismissNewSessionDialog`
- **NewSessionBottomSheet** — `ModalBottomSheet` with `ExecutorDropdown`
and `LoadingButton`, modeled after `StartReviewBottomSheet`
- **ChatFabMenu** — speed-dial FAB with `AnimatedVisibility` for
expand/collapse, labeled menu items via `FabMenuItem`
- **ChatInputBar** — removed Raw Logs and Start Review icon buttons
(actions moved to FAB)
- **WorkspaceChatScreen/ChatPanel** — threaded new session callbacks
through both stateful and stateless overloads
- **Accessibility** — FAB toggle button has proper `contentDescription`
- **Bug fix** — `onConfirmNewSession` now updates `selectedExecutor` to
match the chosen executor

## Test plan

- [x] 4 new ViewModel tests: open dialog, create session (success +
error), dismiss dialog
- [x] Test verifies `selectedExecutor` is updated when creating session
with different executor
- [x] Screenshot tests updated for changed `ChatInputBar` and
`ChatPanel` signatures
- [x] Golden images regenerated via `recordRoborazziDebug`
- [x] `./gradlew check` passes (BUILD SUCCESSFUL)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add prerequisites agent: dataset validation, env setup, and dependency installation (#2)

Introduces Phase 2 (prerequisites) into the ML optimization pipeline, inserting
before baseline to ensure datasets and dependencies are ready before training.

New components:
- skills/prerequisites/SKILL.md: 8-step workflow for data validation, format
  detection, environment setup, and package installation
- agents/prerequisites-agent.md: 11-step agent definition with bulk install,
  GPU-aware package installation, and conda environment support
- scripts/prerequisites_check.py: stdlib-only utility with 8 CLI subcommands
  (scan-imports, check-packages, detect-env, detect-format, detect-format-project,
  validate-data, bulk-install-cmd, gpu-install-cmd)
- skills/prerequisites/references/dataset-formats.md: 15 format types documented

Integration changes:
- Pipeline renumbered: prerequisites(2) → baseline(3) → checkpoint(4) → research(5)
  → implement(5.5) → experiment loop(6) → report(7)
- Schema validator: validate_prerequisites() with inner field warnings
- Pipeline state: Phase 2 validation, Phase 3 prerequisites.json check
- Orchestrate: prepared_train_path/prepared_val_path flow, 12-field user_choices
- Contract tests: prerequisites→orchestrate data flow verification

Hardened over 7 audit rounds: JAX GPU support, uv detection, broken symlink
handling, permission guards, comet_ml mapping, prepared path schema alignment,
bulk-install step, and comprehensive test coverage (512 tests passing).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(mission): move channel callback wiring after channelModule init

setPushToChannelCallback was called before channelModule was declared
(line 6186 vs 6801), causing ReferenceError at startup and Railway
rolling back to old deployment.

Also fix test-eclaw-context-injection.js init-del endpoint.

commit.message:
fix: support string literals inside ${...} interpolation

ANTLR lexer rules for s"..." and f"..." now track ${...} brace nesting
and allow quoted strings inside interpolation expressions. Previously,
s"${func("arg")}" would fail because the lexer terminated at the inner
quote.

New fragments: INTERP_BODY, INTERP_CHAR, BRACE_CONTENT, BRACE_CHAR
handle nested braces and embedded string literals correctly.

Added repro test: examples/interpolation_nested_strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- gangtise_indicator 响应解析 Bug（嵌套两层 envelope，之前直接返回整个 dict）
- gangtise_indicator 工具描述更正：仅支持宏观/行业指标，不支持A股个股财务数据
- deep_research 所有Agent加300s超时保护，超时返回明确提示而非静默失败

Agent使用规范（经实测确认）：
- searcher：问题格式 "公司名+简短关键词"，耗时~47s
- investment_logic：直接输入公司名，耗时~60s
- investigation_outline：直接输入公司名，耗时~67s
- industry_expert：必须是"公司名+产业链"，宽泛词会因资料过多失败，耗时~251s
- theme_daily_report：输入赛道名，耗时~64s

新增：
- prompts/TMT个股深度研究_prompt模板.md（基于实测能力设计的完整研究工作流）
- README 全面更新，含5个Agent详细用法、✅❌示例、返回内容结构说明

commit.message:
v10.1.2129: TS-UX-TYPING-INDICATOR-RACE-FIX-01 — Fix typing dots disappearing during concurrent messages

When user sends two messages quickly, the first response would hide the
typing indicator while the second message was still being processed.

Fix: activeRequests counter in dashboard.js sendMessage():
- activeRequests++ before fetch
- activeRequests-- in finally block
- hideTypingIndicator() only removes dots when activeRequests == 0
- force=true parameter bypasses counter for showTypingIndicator replacement
  and 5-minute safety timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

find openclaw or its config directory.

commit.message:
feat: SuperClaw v3.0.0 — smart team routing, ultrawork, Sisyphus, 41 MCP tools

Major overhaul from v2 to v3:
- Smart team routing: keyword detection auto-composes multi-agent teams
- Ecomode: automatic model tier routing (haiku/sonnet/opus)
- Sisyphus pattern: stop hook blocks session exit during autonomous tasks
- Ultrawork: iterative execution with independent verification
- Circuit breaker: 3 consecutive failures → auto-escalate
- Progressive disclosure: memory search truncation + recall guidance
- Obsidian sync: incremental export with wikilinks
- HUD: 14-element real-time statusline
- Cross-process cron lock files
- Session lifecycle hooks (start/end)
- Comprehensive README with changelog

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Audit pass #6: 5 fixes — .env permissions, temp file safety

- bot.py: Preserve .env file permissions (600) after /provider, /model,
  /apikey rewrites — write_text() was resetting to world-readable 644,
  exposing API keys and tokens
- wizard.py: Same fix for .env rewrite after Ollama model confirmation
- service.py: Replace predictable /tmp/myoldmachine.service with
  tempfile.mkstemp() to prevent symlink attacks on the temp file that
  gets sudo cp'd to /etc/systemd/system/
- service.py: Use shlex.quote() for the temp path in the sudo cp command

Revise implementation plan: orchestrate proven tools, don't rewrite

Research showed battle-tested tools exist for every domain (Prowler,
Nuclei, subfinder/dnsx/httpx, checkdmarc). New plan shells out to
these tools and parses JSON output instead of reimplementing check
logic. Only Okta connector built from scratch (GPL barrier on
existing tools). Includes tool research docs.

commit.message:
CyberDD — full-stack cyber due diligence platform

Backend (Phase 1-2):
- 6 independent scanners: DNS/email, SSL/TLS, tech stack, breach database, security signals, org signals
- AI-powered risk analysis via OpenRouter/Claude with structured risk scoring
- FastAPI REST API (/scan, /report, /export, /health) + CLI interface
- Pydantic models, scan aggregation, report generation

Frontend (Phase 3 — redesigned):
- Minimalist dark mono UI — Bloomberg-meets-Swiss-typography aesthetic
- 3-state flow: landing → scanning progress → results dashboard
- Animated risk score counter, expandable scanner detail panels
- Severity-sorted findings accordion, strengths/recommendations cards
- DM Sans + IBM Plex Mono typography, color reserved for risk signals only

commit.message:
Expand PMR to 16 channels and skip them during CHIRP scan

EU expanded PMR446 from 8 to 16 channels in 2018. The upper 8
channels (446.10625–446.19375 MHz) were missing. Also marks all PMR
channels with Skip=S in the CHIRP export so random PMR traffic does
not interrupt scanning.

commit.message:
Add missing runtime dependencies to package.json

Packages were installed locally but never committed, causing Vercel
git-triggered builds to fail (npm install skipped them) and the
prebuilt deployment to serve macOS-native @resvg/resvg-js binary
instead of the required linux-arm64-gnu binary.

Added to dependencies:
- @resvg/resvg-js  — SVG→PNG for report image generation
- satori           — HTML→SVG for reports
- vite             — client build tool
- tsx              — TypeScript runner (build script)
- esbuild          — server bundler (build script)
- typescript       — compiler
- drizzle-kit      — DB migrations
- @vitejs/plugin-react — React Vite plugin

commit.message:
Fix mobile menu z-index issue using React Portal

Resolved critical bug where mobile menu appeared behind content after navigation.

Root cause: CSS stacking context problem - MobileMenu rendered inside Navbar's fixed positioned container was trapped in that stacking context, unable to compete with elements outside it regardless of z-index value.

Solution: Implemented React Portal pattern to render menu at document.body level
- Used createPortal from react-dom to escape parent stacking context
- Added client-side mounting check for SSR compatibility
- Implemented body scroll locking with position restoration
- Added accessibility attributes (role, aria-modal, aria-label)
- Used inline style z-index for consistency

Also fixed preexisting errors:
- ContactSection.tsx: Fixed schedule JSON parsing type handling
- app/admin/events/[id]/page.tsx: Fixed image preview state handling
